events.name: Open Mic Night
events.desc:
**FRIDAY NIGHT: THE OPEN MIC**

This isn't a stadium, and we don't care if you hit every note perfectly. 
Every Friday night, the stage at Last Hope is yours. Bring your guitar, sing a cover, or just come to enjoy the live music with a cold beer from our bar.

Some nights it's raw acoustic sets from travelers passing through Da Nang. Other nights it's our regulars turning the place into a full-blown living room jam session. 

**Rule #1:** No judgment. 
**Rule #2:** If you perform a song, the bartender might just slide a free shot your way.

Sign-up starts at 8:00 PM. The music starts when it starts. Come as you are.
